name: cn_compounds
_note: Letter / Greek-letter + hanzi forming one word (a compound) take a hyphen ⠤ instead of a blank cell at the boundary. This lexicon is the signal for that decision (see brailix.frontend.zh.insert_cross_kind_boundary_spaces): an adjacent foreign-letter node and hanzi node whose concatenated surface is in this set get a hyphen; a miss falls back to a blank cell (independent words like '已知 α' / '使用 CPU' stay separated). Deliberately incomplete — extend as needed; a miss only reverts to the prior blank-cell behavior, never wrong.
